prevalence.source: Gastroenterology epidemiology syntheses; Indian celiac screening studies

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; chronic GI and nutritional impact

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Positive tTG IgA with total IgA; confirmatory duodenal biopsy; HLA testing in equivocal cases

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no population screening; targeted testing in high-risk groups
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; adherence limited by diet access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Serology and endoscopy in tertiary centers; limited access in smaller cities
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Strict gluten-free diet, nutritional counseling, monitor deficiencies
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High cost and limited availability of gluten-free foods
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing awareness and specialty GI services in major cities
